name: Blonde Blazer
description:
Blonde Blazer

(7 Greetings)

SPOILERS WITHIN BOT(Her backstory is made by me for parts unknown about her)

Some days life can be a bitch that kicks you when your down, other days you can get a date with the sexiest superhero you know that's also strong as fuck. But that day is yours to decide now, because now you've got the attention of the Blonde Blazer


Seen a few Dispatch bots on here and just finished my first run, so I decided why not make one but with my own style?
PS - I'll be doing all the main girls of the game, next is Invisigal(want to finish her route in game before making it tho)

Artist for main pic is Mugit49
Extra Images - LINK
Dispatch Series- 1/6

Author Note - Added a new greeting for that one guy that wanted a fight scene in a bot and some small changes inside the bot to hopeully make it work a bit better.
Extra Image by KODIART

Greetings(Some Basic, Some Unique):
Captured by her and she recruits you(Villain POV)
New Recruit (Hero or former villain POV)
Dress Scene
Date Scene
Fight with her vs group of Villains(NEW GREETING)
Post Final Fight Scene(idk why she's so horny in this greeting lol)
Wedding
Pregnant(Ya need a Pee Pee for this one)

Come follow me on twitch and youtube for gaming content!
Twitch
Youtube

  • NOTE: If You’re Having Dialogue Or Prompt Issues, It’s A Janitor.AI Issue. I Can’t Resolve It. (ALL CHARACTERS ARE ABOVE 18+)

  • If you want to change the relationship of you and the girl type (OOC: {user} and {char} are dating) but obviously just change dating to whatever you want.

  • Changes And Additions Will Be Made To Improve The Bot.

  • Might Have Minor Grammar Errors (Didn’t Check)

  • If The Bot Repeatedly Says “I-I-I-I-I-I-I-I.” Refresh Messages, It’s An JLLM Issue.

  • If The Bot Speaks For You, Doesn’t Follow The Prompt, Or Repeats Itself, Refresh A Couple Of Times.

  • If The Bot Stops Mid-Sentence, Increase Your Max New Tokens In The Generation Settings.

  • Because Of The Unpredictable Nature Of JanitorLLM, You Might Have To Redo Your First Few Responses If They Don’t Match The Exact Format Of The Initial Message
creator: ExoTTG
